message:
Improve CLI command tests

suggest.test.ts:
- Separate output[] and errors[] arrays for cleaner assertions
- Fix exitCode type from null to undefined
- Simplify process.exit mock

Add new test files:
- export.test.ts: Tests for jfp export command
- show.test.ts: Tests for jfp show command
